name: Exa
description: Interact with Exa. This official Exa MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: EXA_API_KEY
env.description: Exa API key for hosted or local search access.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: Streamable HTTP / remote MCP; local stdio wrapper. Auth from source catalog: Optional Exa API key / hosted connector. Official Exa docs and provider-owned repo: https://github.com/exa-labs/exa-mcp-server
